name: code-finish-notifier
description: Shows a popup and optional sound when code execution ends in debug, tasks, or terminal.

commands.title: Code Finish Notifier: Test Success Notification
Code Finish Notifier: Test Error Notification

codeFinishNotifier.showPopup.description: Show a VS Code popup when an execution finishes.

codeFinishNotifier.playSound.description: Play a system beep when an execution finishes.

codeFinishNotifier.notifyOn.description: Choose whether to notify on success, error, or both.

codeFinishNotifier.showDesktopNotificati.description: Mostra notificação nativa do sistema operacional.

codeFinishNotifier.focusFinishedTerminal.description: Quando terminar, traz automaticamente o terminal/código relacionado para frente.

codeFinishNotifier.includeCommandPreview.description: Include a preview of the command line in terminal notifications.
